achievements.description: GDCU-8875 [HOTFIX] Add phone number field to UK email confirmation form page — deployed as hotfix by Kelvin Yee. Field is mandatory and captured on form submission.
GDCU-8881 Iceland Author Image Fixes completed by Ciara Carroll — resolves author image display issues on GDC Iceland following last week's launch.
GDCU-8406 Fix hreflang implementation for Slots Games Pages completed by Sanja Budic — hreflang cluster now covers 12 markets (UK, IE, IN, NZ, IT, SE, NL, NO, RO, AT, GR, DE).

Login modal hotfix deployed by Harden Wallace — fixed sign-in bug on articles where second sign-in attempt failed after sign-out. Also addressed article card sizing issues at xxl breakpoint. Full release confirmed complete.

Cool tones background update merged — Ciara Carroll updated design system FAQ component guidelines with padding recommendations (10–16px containers, 10px corner radius) and shared Figma reference for dev.

New design system text style surfaced from login/signup redesign — Ciara flagged an undocumented dimmer variant of gdc-light-blue used in the sign-in/register modal that needs guidelines defining when/how it's used.

Image carousel shortcode implementation discussion in #gdc-pod — Joshua Smith and Eoin McCarthy confirmed Origins image naming convention (e.g. image="starburst") for the GDCU-8836 shortcode. Gabriel Cornoiu to weigh in.

Iceland post-launch SEO progress: AccuRanker tracking configured, GA4 and GSC live, backlink outreach initiated, content gap analysis underway. Icelandic freelancer search for localisation QA unsuccessful — DeepL translation quality concerns flagged.
achievements.source: Confluence (GDC Iceland Post Launch Tasks Meeting — 16 Apr)

achievements.description: Week 17 Tech SEO Report published by Mattias Hagman — directional call flagged as 'Caution' due to exit clicks under pressure from active attack on IT property. Covers 21–27 April forecast.
Nordics Team Sprint Planning for 20–26 April published by Damjan Jugovic Spajic — Norway, Sweden, Finland, Denmark content sprint tasks documented.
Commercial team end-of-week updates filed (17/04/2026) — Pragmatic Play Jelly Express campaign stats pulled, commercial pipeline updates submitted by team leads.

meeting_summaries.title: GDC Iceland Post Launch Tasks Meeting
meeting_summaries.summary: Post-launch tasks meeting for GDC Iceland (gambling.com/is). Attended by Alexandru-Daniel Vasile and Lucas van Bilderbeek. Focused on SEO and content maturation tasks following the 15 April launch. GA4 and GSC both live. AccuRanker tracking set up but needs fine-tuning once query data matures. Backlink outreach has started. Icelandic localisation QA was attempted but no suitable freelancer found on Fiverr — concerns remain about DeepL translation quality. Internal links work in progress (GS2-191). Gameshub Iceland exists for IS version; EN version is WIP with Alex.
decisions: AccuRanker tracking will be fine-tuned once more GSC query data is available
Backlink outreach strategy informed by competitor backlink analysis — ongoing
No Icelandic freelancer available for localisation QA; relying on DeepL for now
Pavle to assist with setting internal links (GS2-191)
action_items_from_meeting: Lucas van Bilderbeek: Update bonus page (EN version), review and input needed
Alex Vasile: Complete Gameshub Iceland EN version (WIP)
Team: Review GSC query data once available to determine optimisation tasks
Team: Fine-tune AccuRanker tracking when more data available

action_points.action: Respond to Ciara in #gdc-product-led-growth re: design system text style for login/signup modal — needs decision on when/how the dimmer gdc-light-blue variant is used across the design system and how it should be documented in guidelines.
Share logo information from EVE for GDCU-8840 Instagram Headers Widget — Chloe Christie has explicitly tagged Mike to provide this. Also nudge Vic Dadson to update ticket for tracking.
Review Learning Hub imagery Figma prototype (GDCU-8736 — in In Product). Ciara Carroll has shared Figma prototype and tagged Mike for sign-off. Ticket is blocked on this review.
Review and sign off Oplist Redesign on CA/FR Casino Page (GDCU-8801 — in In Product). Ciara Carroll tagged Mike in a review request in early April; still awaiting sign-off.

Follow up on Cosmo Spins Spring Ad Creative (GDCU-8846) — Josh Kerr gave feedback that the creative needs rethinking from perspective of someone who doesn't know Cosmo Spins; message needs to be clearer, less 'gaming' feel. Ciara is reworking. Confirm direction.
action_points.source: Jira GDCU-8846 comments (Ciara Carroll / Chloe Christie, 2026-04-16)

action_points.action: Escalate or prioritise GDCU-8548 🔥 (flagged) — Update Sign In to Trigger After User Tries to Spin on Cosmo Spins. Ticket is flagged and still In Progress (Novica Vukobratovic). Confirm sprint commitment and unblock if needed.
Resolve GDCU-8871 Free to Play App POC v2 moved back to To Do — Carlos Blauth moved it from In Progress to To Do yesterday. Understand what blocked this and whether it's scheduled for next sprint.
Assign GDCU-8874 Page Bloat — reduce HTML payload across all markets (CookieYes, SSR operator list, VWO, inline scripts). High priority, currently unassigned in backlog. Consider for Sprint 9.

Confirm image naming convention for GDCU-8836 Image Carousel Shortcode — Josh/Eoin agreed on Origins naming (e.g. image="starburst"). Ensure Gabriel Cornoiu has confirmed and Nebojsa can proceed with implementation.
Review Week 17 Tech SEO Report — Mattias flagged 'Caution' directional call due to exit clicks under pressure from active attack on IT property. Understand scope and if product action is required.

Prepare for Monday GDC Weekly Sync with Colin Brannigan — review sprint progress, Jira status (3 tickets Done today, 2 in In Product, 1 flagged), Iceland post-launch status, and have a view on revenue trends/performance decline themes raised in last SMT.
Note: GDCU Assemble Standup on Monday (14:30–15:00 BST) clashes with your afternoon annual leave (from 13:00 BST). Decide whether to attend or delegate to Chloe Christie.
